name: Integration Tools, Google Sheets, OpenAI (ChatGPT), JSON, HTTP, LinkedIn

mapper.textPrompt:
Create an 8-slide LinkedIn carousel about: {{1.A}}

CRITICAL: Return ONLY a raw JSON array. 
No backticks. No markdown. No code blocks. No explanation.
Your response must start with [ and end with ]

Each object must have exactly:
- slide_number (number)
- headline (max 8 words)
- body (max 40 words)
- emoji (1 emoji)

Slide 1 = Hook, Slides 2-7 = Value points, Slide 8 = CTA

Write a LinkedIn caption for a carousel about: {{1.A}}. Bold hook on line 1. 3–5 short paragraphs. 3–5 hashtags at end. End with: Save this and follow for more! Under 200 words.
"Write in a single paragraph with no line breaks and no quotation marks."

authenticationType.label: No authenticationUse when no credentials are required for the request.

contentType.label: application/jsonEnter data in the JSON format, as a string or using a data structure.

inputMethod.label: JSON stringEnter the JSON body as a raw text string. If values contain JSON reserved characters, you must escape them manually.

expect.label: Return error if HTTP request fails
